valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Thu 18 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 19 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low just west of Bailey 993 slow-moving, filling 994 by midday tomorrow. New low expected Fair Isle 999 by same time
